descriptions.description: The Python-5 is a short-range, air-to-air missile developed by Rafael Advanced Defense Systems of Israel. It represents the fifth generation of the Python missile family, featuring advanced imaging-infrared seeker technology with imaging and electro-optical guidance capabilities. The Python-5 is an all-aspect missile capable of high off-boresight launch, with a lock-on-after-launch capability allowing engagements up to 100 degrees off the aircraft's boresight. The missile entered public view at the 2003 Paris Air Show and has since become a key armament for Israeli aircraft and the primary interceptor in the SPYDER ground-based air defense system.
descriptions.shortDescription: Israeli all-aspect imaging-infrared short-range AAM with lock-on-after-launch capability.

descriptions.description: The Python-5 employs an advanced imaging infrared seeker with integrated electro-optical homing guidance, providing superior target discrimination and countermeasure rejection. The missile is powered by a solid-fuel rocket motor, achieving Mach 4 speeds and enabling rapid intercepts of high-performance targets. The airframe features delta control fins for agility in dogfight engagements. The warhead is a fragmentation type with proximity detonation. The missile’s lock-on-after-launch capability allows pilots to disengage after launch, reducing their exposure during multiple simultaneous engagements. The compact diameter of 160 mm enables carriage on lightweight combat aircraft and integration into vehicle-mounted defense systems.
descriptions.shortDescription: Solid-rocket powered, imaging infrared seeker with full-sphere targeting and lock-on-after-launch.

descriptions.description: The Python-5 is operationally deployed by the Israeli Air Force on fighter jets including the F-15, F-16, and Gripen variants. The missile has seen combat employment during the 2006 Lebanon War and subsequent operations. It serves as the primary short-range interceptor component of the SPYDER integrated air defense system, providing point defense for tactical and strategic assets. The missile has been confirmed effective against unmanned aerial vehicles in operational employment. Export variants have been adopted by allied air forces in multiple regions.
descriptions.shortDescription: Primary short-range interceptor for Israeli Air Force fighters and SPYDER ground-based system.
